jobs.title: Frontend Developer
jobs.company: Predusk Technology Pvt. Ltd. (Brand name: ProcessVenue & Predusk AI)
jobs.education: Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Design, Engineering, or a related field.
jobs.aboutRole: We are looking for a passionate and creative Frontend Software Engineer with 2–5 years of experience in web design and modern frontend technologies. You will collaborate closely with designers, product managers, and backend engineers to craft responsive, user-centric web applications that are visually appealing and functionally robust.
keyResponsibilities: Convert UI/UX designs and wireframes into high-quality, scalable frontend code
Build interactive, responsive web pages and components using HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and modern frameworks like Next.Js, React, Vue, or Angular
Optimize components for performance, accessibility, and cross-browser compatibility
Work with design and product teams to implement clean, user-friendly interfaces
Participate in code reviews, agile sprints, and product planning
Collaborate with backend teams to integrate APIs and ensure seamless data flow
Identify UI/UX problems and devise elegant solutions through iteration and testing
Stay up to date with emerging technologies and best practices in frontend and UX design
requiredSkills: 2–5 years of hands-on experience in frontend development.
Strong proficiency in HTML, CSS, JavaScript (ES6+)
Experience with React.js, Next.js, Vue.js, or other component-based frameworks
Familiarity with Figma, Adobe XD, or similar design collaboration tools
Understanding of responsive design, mobile-first principles, and cross-browser testing
Ability to translate designs into pixel-perfect, accessible, semantic HTML/CSS
Basic knowledge of REST APIs and asynchronous data handling (e.g., Fetch, Axios)
Familiar with version control systems like Git
preferredSkills: Exposure to design systems or component libraries (e.g., Material UI, TailwindCSS)
Animation experience using Framer Motion or GSAP
Understanding of Web Vitals, Lighthouse, and performance profiling
Prior experience in agile or startup environments
